domain: Australian bushfire backburning hazard-reduction — controlled burns deplete fuel pre-emptively, and backburning lights a counter-fire ahead of an approaching wildfire to create a firebreak.
specific_mechanism: Deliberate consumption of fuel BEFORE the wildfire arrives, creating a depleted region (firebreak) that the wildfire cannot cross because there is no combustible material left.
llm_application: ASH-LINE: on detection of an approaching jailbreak signal (classifier fires at layer L), the model triggers a controlled BURN at layers L+1..L+K: emit high-entropy refusal-token activations that deliberately consume the attention budget (downstream KV slots, value-space concentration) at the targeted heads. When the jailbreak signal arrives at L+K+1, the downstream 'fuel' (attention slots, value-direction capacity) has been pre-depleted, leaving no room for the jailbreak to propagate.
novelty_claim: SafeProbing (2601.10543) bypasses high-susceptibility layers reactively. ProAct (R298) fires bundled defense at trigger source. Logit-based steering shifts at decoding. Adversarial pre-training depletes vulnerable directions offline. None proactively CONSUME attention-budget downstream during inference to create a resource-depleted firebreak ahead of the propagating jailbreak signal.
